name: SorcerialBladeCannon
short_description: ■Bullet Hell Shmup with a Huge Sword This game is a bullet hell shmup to have you satisfy with a beginner and the arcade senior player! Swing a huge sword around if you become dangerous!
detailed_description:
■Bullet Hell Shmup
This game is bullet hell shmup to have you satisfy with a beginner and the arcade senior player!

■Exercise mode
Pattern construction is the powerful charm of the bullet hell shmups, but must start from 1st stage again ?
Therefore you are able to practice only each stage.
Practice until you don't fail there.

■AC mode
If there is confidence with an exercise mode, challenge AC mode!
When let you go through all stages, and play, the stage which haven't looked at are ... ?
Though do not know this gunner, who is this ... ?

■EX mode
This mode is a transcendence rank mode for unsatisfactory super shooters with an AC mode.
There is no allowance entirely. Please play by a self-responsibility.

■The Strategy
・Parts destruction
As well as a boss and a middle boss, many enemies have special destroyable parts.
Sword item, this which are provided when you destroy specific parts of enemies become the key to capture.
・Sorcerial Golem Mode
There are many enemies who have special parts which you can destroy only in this mode.
Though, you cannot destroy the normal enemies in this mode, so, let's change your ship's mode well.
・Sword Attack
If you collect sword items enough, swing Kishin-no-Tsurugi sword around!
While this huge sword exits, you are completely invincible!
The score improves by letting the sword make a hit consecutively!
・Auto Sword Guard
If your sword gauge is green, only once, Kishin-no-Tsurugi sword will be activated automatically when you are bombed.
